description_long: This is a pair of slip-on shoes with a rugged, utilitarian design, featuring a brown leather upper and black rubber soles. The shoes have a low-cut profile with elastic side gores for easy wearing and removal, and a pull tab at the heel for added convenience. The leather surface shows some creasing and subtle wear, indicating regular use, while the black soles appear thick and durable, suitable for urban walking. Branding is visible on the side, embossed into the leather, and the overall construction suggests comfort and practicality. The shoes lack traditional laces, opting instead for a seamless, streamlined look. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort.
description: A pair of brown leather slip-on shoes with black rubber soles, elastic side gores, and a pull tab at the heel. The shoes show signs of light wear and are designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the rounded toe, creased leather upper, and black rubber sole.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the embossed branding, elastic gore, and heel pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear and side view focusing on the heel area, pull tab, and the back seam of the shoes.
description_view_3: Angled front view displaying the slip-on entry, elastic gore, and the smooth, slightly worn leather surface.
attribute_logo: Embossed 'MERRELL' text on the side near the elastic gore, same color as the leather.
